description: Wave 31 Lillie (SHL-62) attaches to aether-foundation as President Lusamine's daughter and the corpus's first Aether-named-family-member depiction. Aether Foundation body had Lillie pre-named in Caveats + See-also as a pending sibling solo; the slot is filled at the faction-collective tier. Solo Lillie node deferred — single corpus card, below threshold-relaxed-precedent of ≥2 set under the Acerola commission. Corpus state moves from 1 to 2 enriched Aether-affiliated cards.
